title: WHISPER not rate-limited: N authenticated senders can flood offline queue
description: ws.rs WHISPER/SEALED_WHISPER are exempt from rate limiting. N authenticated senders can fill the offline queue of any recipient (N*1000 messages given the per-enqueue cap). The per-sender-per-recipient cost is zero rate-limit tokens. Consider adding a per-recipient-total cap enforced in a single atomic query, or applying a cross-sender rate limit.
